layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Widget interior padding should be p-6.
layout.radius: rounded-2xl for main widget, rounded-full for action pills, rounded-xl for chat bubbles.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and messages for readability. Optical alignment on buttons.

surfaces.widget_container: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(18,53,36,0.08)]
surfaces.inputs: Flat Solid variant: bg-[#F4F1E9] border border-black/5 hover:border-[#123524]/20 focus:border-[#C65D47] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C65D47]

widget_trigger.style: Bottom-right fixed placement. Pill shape initially 'Chat with Sleek AI', transitions to circle/icon on scroll or close. Deep forest green (#123524) background with white text.
widget_trigger.behavior: Auto-opens on first visit after 1-second delay.

chat_message_ai.style: Left-aligned. No heavy background. Use a crisp typography approach with a 1px left-border or indented style, accompanied by the AI minimal avatar.

chat_message_user.style: Right-aligned. Solid warm sand background (#F4F1E9), text-[#123524]. Rounded corners with a sharp bottom-right corner.

suggested_prompts.style: Horizontal list of pills. border border-[#123524]/10 bg-transparent text-[#4A5D53] hover:bg-[#123524]/5 hover:text-[#123524] transition-all.

lead_capture_form.style: Embedded natively in the chat flow. Uses Shadcn form components customized to match the 'inputs' surface strategy.

animations.widget_entrance: Slide up from bottom and subtle scale up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).

hero_background_texture.description: Abstract sand texture for subtle background grounding

singapore_office_skyline.description: Singapore modern office skyline for landing page context

ai_avatar_icon.description: Minimalist geometric square icon for AI avatar

icons.usage: Use crisp, standard strokes. Size mostly 16px to 20px.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure Terracotta (#C65D47) and Deep Forest (#123524) have proper contrast against Bone White (#FDFBF7).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (widget trigger, inputs, send buttons, prompts) MUST include 'data-testid' (e.g., 'data-testid="sleek-widget-trigger"').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Contextual Landing Page: Build a simple, premium landing page representing Sleek Start using the provided images to give the widget context.
2. Widget Initialization: Implement the floating chat widget on the bottom right. It must auto-open upon first load with a Framer Motion staggered entrance.
3. Styling Constraints: Adhere strictly to the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. DO NOT use generic SaaS blue, purple, or teal.

4. Component Architecture: Use purely customized Shadcn UI components for interactive logic (Forms, Inputs, ScrollArea). Override Shadcn's default Vercel-look with our specific rounded classes and organic borders.
5. Conversation Flow: Support max 3 clarification questions natively before showing the embedded Lead Capture form. Once form is submitted, show a 'handoff to human' success state.
